chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 2092 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ Hearing of case. 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 8364/26. 2. For hearing of main case. 13.04.2026 Ms. Fouzia Rasheed, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, Advocate for Respondents No.2 & 4. Mr. Asif Ali Siyal, Advocate for the Respondent No.3. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, DAG. ---------- Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondents No. 2 & 4, whereas Mr. Asif Ali Siyal Advocate appears on behalf of Respondent No.3. They jointly state that the a hearing notice has been issued to the Petitioner in relation to the matter pending before the Classification Committee and submit that the Representation of the Petitioner would be considered, pending which the Pay Order (Annexure “J” at page 39 of the Court file) issued as security for provisional release of the subject consignment (Goods Declaration filed as Annexure “C” at page 21 of the Court file) would not be encashed. As such, the purpose of the Petition appears to have been served. Accordingly, the Petition stands disposed of in the forging terms with listed application. Judge Judge Ayaz
